description: Quiz questions about Mint Club bonding curve platform and token creation

questions.question: What is Mint Club?
questions.explainer: Mint Club is a bonding curve platform that enables fair, mathematical token launches without pre-mines or rug pull risks.

questions.question: What can you do with Quiztals?
questions.explainer: Quiztals can be staked to earn rewards through revenue sharing in the Mint Club ecosystem, generating passive income.

questions.question: Quiztals will become...?
questions.explainer: Quiztals will transition from off-chain rewards to on-chain tokens, enabling true DeFi integration and trading.

questions.question: What does Mint Club use?
questions.explainer: Bonding curves automatically adjust token prices based on supply and demand using mathematical formulas for fair pricing.

questions.question: What can you create?
questions.explainer: Mint Club allows creation of both tokens and NFTs with bonding curve pricing, enabling diverse digital asset launches.

questions.question: What's special about tokens?
questions.explainer: Tokens automatically discover their fair market price through bonding curves, eliminating manipulation and ensuring transparency.

questions.question: How does Mint Club protect?
questions.explainer: Smart contracts automatically lock liquidity and enforce fair trading rules, preventing rug pulls and protecting investors.

questions.question: What's Mint Club's token model?
questions.explainer: Fair launch curves ensure everyone pays the same price based on timing, eliminating pre-sales and insider advantages.

questions.question: How are tokens priced?
questions.explainer: Mathematical bonding curve formulas determine prices automatically, ensuring fair and predictable token valuation.

questions.question: What's unique about launches?
questions.explainer: Zero pre-mined tokens ensure all participants start equally, preventing unfair advantages for developers or insiders.

questions.question: How to prevent rug pulls?
questions.explainer: Locked liquidity in smart contracts prevents developers from draining funds, providing guaranteed exit liquidity for investors.

questions.question: What can you stake?
questions.explainer: MINT tokens can be staked to earn revenue sharing from platform fees, providing passive income to token holders.

questions.question: What's the core feature?
questions.explainer: Token creation is the core feature, enabling anyone to launch fair, bonding curve-powered tokens without technical expertise.

questions.question: How does pricing work?
questions.explainer: Automatic bonding curves adjust prices as tokens are bought or sold, ensuring fair price discovery without manipulation.

questions.question: What's the approach to fairness?
questions.explainer: Mathematical rules encoded in smart contracts ensure fairness automatically, eliminating human bias and manipulation.

questions.question: What can users launch?
questions.explainer: Users can launch both tokens and NFTs with bonding curve pricing, enabling diverse digital asset creation strategies.

questions.question: How are tokens secured?
questions.explainer: Smart contracts automatically secure tokens and liquidity, providing trustless protection without relying on human intervention.

questions.question: What's the token mechanism?
questions.explainer: Bonding curves create dynamic token supply and pricing, ensuring fair distribution and preventing artificial scarcity.

questions.question: How ensure transparency?
questions.explainer: On-chain verification allows anyone to inspect token mechanics and pricing formulas, ensuring complete transparency.

questions.question: What's the main innovation?
questions.explainer: Fair token launches eliminate pre-sales and insider advantages, ensuring everyone has equal opportunity to participate.

questions.question: How do tokens start?
questions.explainer: Zero pre-minted tokens ensure fair launches where early supporters and developers have equal access and pricing.

questions.question: What governs prices?
questions.explainer: Smart contracts automatically govern pricing through bonding curve formulas, eliminating human manipulation and ensuring fairness.

questions.question: What makes it unique?
questions.explainer: Automated fairness through smart contracts eliminates human bias and ensures equal treatment for all participants.

questions.question: What type of LP tokens?
questions.explainer: Non-transferable LP tokens prevent liquidity extraction and rug pulls, ensuring permanent liquidity for token holders.

questions.question: How handle token burns?
questions.explainer: Bonding curves automatically handle token burns by reducing supply and increasing prices when tokens are sold back.

questions.question: Minimum to create token?
questions.explainer: Only gas fees are required to create tokens, making token creation accessible to everyone regardless of financial status.

questions.question: How handle token sales?
questions.explainer: Token sales occur through bonding curves, ensuring fair pricing and automatic liquidity without manual intervention.

questions.question: What's the distribution approach?
questions.explainer: Fair launch only approach ensures everyone pays the same price based on timing, eliminating preferential treatment.

questions.question: How calculate buy price?
questions.explainer: Bonding formulas mathematically calculate buy prices based on current supply, ensuring predictable and fair pricing.

questions.question: What's locked in contracts?
questions.explainer: Both liquidity and pricing logic are locked in smart contracts, preventing manipulation and ensuring permanent functionality.

questions.question: How sell tokens?
questions.explainer: Selling tokens through bonding curves provides instant liquidity and fair pricing without relying on traditional order books.

questions.question: What determines token price?
questions.explainer: Token prices are determined by supply and demand dynamics encoded in bonding curve mathematics, ensuring fair market pricing.

questions.question: How are NFTs priced?
questions.explainer: NFTs use bonding curves for dynamic pricing, creating fair price discovery based on demand rather than arbitrary fixed prices.

questions.question: What's unique about NFTs?
questions.explainer: Curve-based NFT pricing ensures fair valuation based on actual demand, eliminating speculation and price manipulation.

questions.question: How protect traders?
questions.explainer: Automatic pricing through bonding curves protects traders from manipulation and ensures fair, predictable token valuations.

questions.question: What's the trading mechanism?
questions.explainer: Smart contract trading mechanisms provide trustless, automated trading without intermediaries or centralized order books.

questions.question: How are fees handled?
questions.explainer: Transparent and fixed fees ensure predictable trading costs and prevent hidden charges or variable fee manipulation.

questions.question: What's the staking model?
questions.explainer: Revenue sharing model distributes platform fees to MINT token stakers, creating sustainable passive income opportunities.

questions.question: How handle liquidity?
questions.explainer: Auto-locked liquidity prevents rug pulls and ensures permanent trading availability without relying on manual commitment.

questions.question: What's special about UI?
questions.explainer: One-click token creation simplifies the launch process, making token creation accessible to users without technical expertise.

questions.question: How launch new tokens?
questions.explainer: Fair curve launches ensure equal pricing for all participants based on timing, eliminating unfair pre-sale advantages.

questions.question: What happens when buying?
questions.explainer: Bonding curves increase prices as more tokens are bought, creating natural price appreciation based on demand.

questions.question: What's the development focus?
questions.explainer: User simplicity prioritizes accessibility and ease of use, making DeFi token creation available to everyone regardless of technical skill.
